However, life soon imitates art when a monstrous anaconda with a thirst for blood starts hunting them down one by one.

programme.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Four women take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime, cross-country adventure.

programme.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
programme.desc: Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could change the world, while Spike's encounter with cult leader Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: While vacationing at a remote cabin in the woods, a young girl and her parents are taken hostage by four armed strangers who demand they make an unthinkable choice to avert the apocalypse. Confused, scared and with limited access to the outside world, the family must decide what they believe before all is lost.

programme.title: The Curse of the Necklace
programme.desc: When Laura Davis is gifted an antique necklace, her daughters uncover a sinister force hidden within that threatens to destroy everything they love.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress

programme.title: Gem & Shaz
programme.desc: Two Asian Canadian teenage girls are given one hour at the school dance by their strict immigrant parents and are determined to make the most of it.

programme.title: Reality Bites: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah's favorite reality show takes over "The Cookie Jar." When the producer is found dead, Hannah and Norman team up to track down the killer. Chad invites Hannah to court.

programme.title: Obsessed to Death
programme.desc: Cassie becomes obsessed with the woman who stole her man away from her.

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Universal Language
programme.desc: Two women find frozen cash, try to retrieve it. A tour guide leads tourists around Winnipeg sites. A man quits his job and visits his mother.

programme.title: Asteroid City
programme.desc: World-changing events spectacularly disrupt the itinerary of a Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention in an American desert town circa 1955.

programme.title: Measures for a Funeral
programme.desc: Audrey Benac confronts her history and destiny as she dives into the life of forgotten Canadian violinist Kathleen Parlow. Leaving behind her dying mother, herself a failed violinist, Audrey is haunted by her mother's unfulfilled dreams.

programme.title: Gunner
programme.desc: Ray Miller tries to save his sons, Luke and Travis, from a dangerous drug gang.

programme.title: Rory Scovel: Religion, Sex and a Few Things In Between

programme.title: Undercover Grandpa
programme.desc: A shy young man turns to his grandfather and his grandfather's old war buddies to help him rescue the woman of his dreams from kidnappers.

programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.
